link_rule: Application links must be copied only from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.
llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Descriptions are short previews. Fetch detail_path only for shortlisted roles. Copy job URLs exactly from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Assistant Manager, Finance & Tax
jobs.description_preview: About The Role • Serve as the legal entity lead in China, accountable for financial compliance of the entity’s statutory financial statements. • Act as the primary BASF contact with local government authorities (e.g., tax authorities) to ensure efficient, accurate and sustainable handling of tax and reporting...
